title: Not Enough Vulkan
description: Not Enough Vulkan is a fork of Sodium Extra that is focused on improving VulkanMod
body:
# What is Not Enough Vulkan?
Not Enough Vulkan is a fork of Sodium Extra that aims to bring most of OptiFine's eye-candy options to VulkanMod which is another optimization mod like Sodium.

## Features
Here is a basic rundown of what this mod does.

- **Animations Settings** (Control fire, water, lava, block animations and etc...)
- **Particles Settings** (Control all types of particles, including ones from other mods)
- **Details Settings** (Control sky, stars, sun/moon, weather, and much more)
- **Render Settings** (Control fog, static entities, and other miscellaneous renderings)
- **Extra Settings** (Display FPS, coordinates, toast notifications, clouds, and much more)

Other than all the above settings, **Not Enough Vulkan also brings compatibility patches to help some mods work better alongside VulkanMod.**

### Improves Compatibility With [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/project/JYQhtZtO):
- Includes Patches for [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/project/M08ruV16)
- Includes Patches for Linux Wayland (Optional)
- Adds a monitor selector for use with multiple monitors

## Modpack Permissions
This is a free and open-source project; you can include it in your mod pack as long as you provide attribution!

## Common Questions
- **Do I need VulkanMod installed for this mod to work?** Yes, You will need to download VulkanMod for this mod to work.
- **Can I re-host/upload this mod somewhere else?** Yes, as long as you provide the mod source code.
- **Will you add x features to this mod?** No, unless It's added to Sodium Extra first.
- **I have more questions!** Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/BFmZU9kUbR)!

## Special Thanks to Sodium Extra
[Support Sodium Extra Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/flashyreese)
